text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm at the shopping<n>district...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yay! Super discounted protein bars,<n>acquired!

text_block_list.name: Child
text_block_list.text: Thanks for getting the balloon back<n>for me!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: No problem! Just hold it tight this time!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin seems to be flexing her<n>explosive
power even while she<n>shops.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Waaah, Ineeees!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Hello, hello! Didn't you say<n>you were
going on your first date ever<n>today?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yeah... But he's not showing up!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I messaged him, but he hasn't even<n>read it. I
wonder if something<n>happened.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I thought about going to his house to<n>check up on
him, but if I've just been<n>stood up, I'll look silly.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Well, he might come if you<n>wait a bit
longer... or it might be a<n>waste of your time.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
In times like these, you need to be<n>brave and
just go and see!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
On the off chance that something's<n>happened to
him, you can still make it<n>in time if you rush!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: You're right! I'll go and check!<n>Thanks, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Good luck! I know everything'll turn<n>out fine!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...I know it will. For you... and me.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Gyah?! You... You're from Tracen<n>Academy,
right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I was just saying... uh, how do I put<n>this?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
A long time ago, when I was having<n>trouble with
something, someone else<n>helped give me a push.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That girl just now reminded me of<n>myself back
then. That's why I<n>couldn't resist stepping in.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Doors won't open if you just sit<n>around and
wait. Which is why we<n>open them ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's about knowing where you want<n>to go, and
getting there faster than<n>anyone... Just gotta take
that first step<n>with conviction!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Listening to Ines Fujin's words and<n>seeing her
perspective really boosts<n>my courage.
